title: Package Download and Installation
interaction_flow: Installer::run() → sets DownloadManager preferences: setPreferSource/setPreferDist/setSourceFallback
Installer::run() → calls doInstall(localRepo) or doUpdate(localRepo, install)
doInstall/doUpdate → InstallationManager::execute(repo, operations[], devMode, runScripts, downloadOnly)
InstallationManager::execute() → batches operations (composer-plugin ops isolated in own batches)
InstallationManager::execute() → for each batch: downloadAndExecuteBatch(repo, batch, cleanupPromises, ...)
--- PHASE 1: DOWNLOAD (parallel via React Promises) ---
downloadAndExecuteBatch() → for each non-uninstall operation: installer->download(package, prevPackage)
LibraryInstaller::download(package, prevPackage) → getInstallPath(package) → DownloadManager::download(package, downloadPath, prevPackage)
DownloadManager::download() → getAvailableSources(package, prevPackage) [returns ordered ['dist','source'] or ['source','dist'] based on preferDist/preferSource/resolvePackageInstallPreference]
DownloadManager::download() → package->setInstallationSource(source) → getDownloaderForPackage(package) [looks up by distType or sourceType]
DownloadManager::download() → downloader->download(package, targetDir, prevPackage) → returns PromiseInterface
On download failure: if sourceFallback=true and more sources remain → retry with next source; else throw
FileDownloader::download() → processUrl(package, url) [updates dist reference if needed]
FileDownloader::download() → EventDispatcher::dispatch(PRE_FILE_DOWNLOAD) [plugins may change URL/cacheKey]
FileDownloader::download() → cache->sha1(cacheKey) + cache->copyTo(cacheKey, fileName) [CACHE HIT path → resolve with fileName]
FileDownloader::download() [CACHE MISS] → HttpDownloader::addCopy(processedUrl, fileName, transportOptions) → Promise
On HTTP success (accept callback) → cache->copyFrom(cacheKey, fileName) [write to cache]
FileDownloader::download() → hash_file('sha1', fileName) === package->getDistSha1Checksum() [verify checksum]
FileDownloader::download() → EventDispatcher::dispatch(POST_FILE_DOWNLOAD)
On HTTP failure (reject callback): retry up to 3 times, then try next URL in distUrls list, else throw
InstallationManager::downloadAndExecuteBatch() → waitOnPromises(downloadPromises) [blocks until all downloads done]
If downloadOnly=true → runCleanup(cleanupPromises) and return
--- PHASE 2: PREPARE + INSTALL (sequential per batch, parallel within) ---
executeBatch() → for each operation: installer->prepare(opType, package, prevPackage) → DownloadManager::prepare() → downloader->prepare() [no-op for FileDownloader]
executeBatch() → promise.then(() => installer->install/update/uninstall(repo, operation))
LibraryInstaller::install(repo, package) → installCode(package) → DownloadManager::install(package, downloadPath)
DownloadManager::install() → getDownloaderForPackage(package) → downloader->install(package, targetDir)
FileDownloader::install() → filesystem->emptyDirectory(path) → filesystem->rename(tmpFile, path/distFilename) → chmod binaries
ArchiveDownloader::install() → creates temp dir (vendor/composer/<random>) → extract(package, fileName, temporaryDir) [abstract: ZipDownloader or TarDownloader]
ArchiveDownloader::install() after extract → deletes archive file → moves extracted contents to targetDir (handles single top-level dir unwrapping) → filesystem->removeDirectoryAsync(temporaryDir)
On extract failure → clearLastCacheWrite(package) + removeDirectory(temporaryDir) + removeDirectory(path)
executeBatch() → cleanupPromises[index]() → installer->cleanup() → DownloadManager::cleanup() → downloader->cleanup() [removes tmp files]
executeBatch() → repo->write(devMode, installationManager) [persist installed package to lock/installed.json]
executeBatch() → waitOnPromises(promises)
executeBatch() → postExecCallbacks: EventDispatcher::dispatchPackageEvent(POST_PACKAGE_INSTALL/UPDATE/UNINSTALL)
key_relationships: InstallationManager orchestrates LibraryInstaller (and other InstallerInterface impls)
DownloadManager holds map<string,DownloaderInterface> downloaders keyed by type (zip, tar, git, svn, hg, etc.)
DownloadManager selects source vs dist via resolvePackageInstallPreference + preferSource/preferDist flags
FileDownloader implements DownloaderInterface, handles 'dist' source type
ArchiveDownloader extends FileDownloader, overrides install() to extract archives
FileDownloader depends_on Filesystem (ensureDirectoryExists, rename, unlink, removeDirectoryPhp)
branching_logic: preferDist=true OR resolvePackageInstallPreference()='dist' → dist tried first, source fallback
preferSource=true → source tried first, dist fallback
package->isDev() + no explicit preference → source preferred
prevPackage installationSource preserved if available in new package (update continuity)
Cache hit (sha1 match + file exists) → skip HTTP download
distSha1Checksum present → verify hash_file('sha1') after download
HTTP 499 → retries=0, empty urls, no retry
downloadOnly=true → skip prepare/install/cleanup after download phase
ArchiveDownloader: singleDirAtTopLevel → unwrap top-level dir when moving to target
ArchiveDownloader: target exists and non-empty → renameRecursively (merge) instead of rename
important_notes: All download/install phases use React Promises for async parallelism. Downloads happen first in parallel for all packages in a batch, then installs happen. Plugin packages ('composer-plugin') are isolated in their own batch to ensure they are activated before dependent packages. Cache key = sha1(processedUrl), stored as 'vendor/name/<sha1hash>.distType'. Temp archive files stored at 'vendor/composer/tmp-<md5hash>.<ext>'. ArchiveDownloader uses a random temp dir 'vendor/composer/<hex8>' for extraction before moving to final path. Source fallback (sourceFallback=true by default) allows retrying with VCS source if dist download fails.
